(1) PAKISTAN ARMY CHIEF MUNIR IN TEHRAN: Asim Munir arrived in Tehran with fresh US proposal to advance Round 2 talks. First Pakistani Army Chief visit to Iran since war began. Bringing US message on nuclear compromise. (2) 'IN PRINCIPLE' CEASEFIRE EXTENSION (AP): Regional officials told AP that US and Iran have an 'in principle agreement' to extend the ceasefire beyond Apr 21 to allow more diplomacy. Senior US official to CNBC: 'has not formally agreed' — extension not formal yet. (3) TRUMP 'AMAZING TWO DAYS AHEAD' + 'BEATEN THEM MILITARILY': Trump Times of Israel: 'I think you're going to be watching an amazing two days ahead.' Fox Business: 'We've beaten them militarily, totally.' Said not thinking about extending ceasefire — implies deal, not extension, is the goal. (4) NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH HOPES: Pakistani mediators optimistic about 'major breakthrough' on nuclear front per Al Jazeera/ANI. Key gap now clearer: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze. Iran's ~440kg HEU stockpile on table. (5) WHITE HOUSE 'FEELS GOOD': Press secretary: 'We feel good about the prospects of a deal.' Discussions 'productive and ongoing.' Iran spokesperson: 'several messages exchanged through Pakistan.' (6) IRAN PETROCHEMICALS SUSPENDED: Iran National Petrochemical Company halted all exports 'until further notice' (Apr 13 order) — $13B/yr industry, ~$54M/day, to prioritize domestic supply after South Pars strikes. (7) BLOCKADE DAY 3 NO CONFRONTATION: 10+ ships turned back since Monday. Iran threatened to block Persian Gulf + Sea of Oman + Red Sea if blockade continues — counter-threat but no action. Brent $94.89 (-0.87%). WTI ~$90.72. Zero attacks D40-D48 (10 straight). Ceasefire Day 10 — 5 days to Apr 21. Convergence 5.7 (↑ from 5.0).

Iran's 5-point counter: end attacks, security guarantees, $270B reparations, sovereignty over Hormuz, international recognition. (3) INTERNET PARTIAL RESTORATION: Iran started offering 'pro internet' package for BUSINESSES (April 14 — Bloomberg, ASL19). Citizens still cut off — but first crack in 47-day blackout. $30-40M/day direct cost to Iranian economy driving partial reversal. (4) ISRAEL-LEBANON TALKS OUTCOME: Lebanon amb Hamadeh: 'constructive.' Israel amb Leiter: 'wonderful exchange.' Both sides agreed next round in 'a few weeks' in Washington. Key ask: remove Hezbollah + ceasefire. Hezbollah still opposing. Rubio: 'working against decades of history.' (5) BLOCKADE 'FULLY IMPLEMENTED' (CENTCOM): All seaborne trade to/from Iran halted. sitrep: D48 (Apr 16 07:00 ET): PAKISTAN ARMY CHIEF MUNIR ARRIVES IN TEHRAN — NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH PUSH. General Asim Munir, Pakistan's Army Chief, arrived in Tehran (Apr 15 evening local) carrying a fresh US proposal for Round 2 talks. Pakistani mediators tell Al Jazeera they are 'optimistic about a major breakthrough' on Iran's nuclear programme. Key nuclear gap now defined: 5-yr vs 20-yr uranium enrichment freeze. Iran's ~440kg highly enriched uranium stockpile on the table.

'IN PRINCIPLE' CEASEFIRE EXTENSION — NOT FORMAL YET. TRUMP: 'AMAZING TWO DAYS AHEAD.' AP (regional officials): US and Iran have 'in principle agreement' to extend ceasefire beyond Apr 21. BUT senior US official to CNBC: 'US has not formally agreed to extension.' Trump told Times of Israel he's 'not thinking about extending ceasefire' and predicts 'an amazing two days ahead' — deal, not extension, appears to be the goal. White House: 'We feel good about the prospects of a deal.' Iran: 'Several messages exchanged through Pakistan.'

IRAN PETROCHEMICALS SUSPENDED + COUNTER-THREAT ON GULF SHIPPING. Iran National Petrochemical Company halted all exports 'until further notice' (Apr 13 order) to prioritize domestic supply after South Pars strikes — $13B/yr, ~$54M/day offline. Iran also threatened to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman AND Red Sea shipping if US blockade continues. Blockade Day 3: 10+ ships turned back, no confrontation — Iran calculating, not acting on threat.

TRUMP: 'WE'VE BEATEN THEM MILITARILY, TOTALLY.' BRENT $94.89 (↓), WTI $90.72 (↓). Fox Business. Oil fell further on deal signals — Brent down from D47 $95.72. Market pricing ~40% deal probability before Apr 21. Business internet partial continuing — Day 3. Zero attacks D40-D48 (10 straight days). Ceasefire Day 10 — 5 days to Apr 21.

CONVERGENCE 5.7 — FOURTH CONSECUTIVE IMPROVEMENT. DEAL AND COLLAPSE TIED AT 31%. D45: 4.2 → D46: 4.6 → D47: 5.0 → D48: 5.7. Biggest single-day jump in convergence. Deal 31% = highest probability since original ceasefire Apr 7. Collapse 31% = lowest since ceasefire began. Both scenarios now tied — coin flip moment.

RISKS: 5-YR vs 20-YR NUCLEAR GAP NOT BRIDGED. COUNTER-THREAT. 5 DAYS TO EXPIRY. Even with Munir in Tehran, the nuclear gap is structural: Iran likely accepting 5-yr freeze; US wants 20-yr. 440kg HEU disposal method unresolved. Iran's counter-blockade threat (Gulf/Red Sea/Oman) = escalation card still in hand. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry.
sitrep_fa: روز ۴۸ (۱۶ آوریل): منیر وارد تهران — پیشرفت هسته‌ای. ژنرال عاصم منیر، رئیس ارتش پاکستان، با پیام جدید آمریکا وارد تهران شد. میانجیان پاکستانی: 'خوشبین به پیشرفت بزرگ هسته‌ای.' شکاف کلیدی: ۵ سال vs ۲۰ سال توقف غنی‌سازی. ۴۴۰ کیلوگرم HEU روی میز.

توافق اصولی تمدید — هنوز رسمی نشده. ترامپ: 'دو روز شگفت‌انگیز.' AP (مقامات منطقه): توافق اصولی برای تمدید. مقام ارشد آمریکا CNBC: رسمی نشده. ترامپ: 'به تمدید فکر نمی‌کنم' + 'دو روز شگفت‌انگیز' = هدف توافق نه تمدید. کاخ سفید: 'خوشبینیم.' ایران: 'پیام‌ها رد و بدل شد.'

پتروشیمی متوقف + تهدید ضدمحاصره. شرکت ملی پتروشیمی: صادرات متوقف تا اطلاع ثانوی. $۱۳B/سال، $۵۴M/روز متوقف. ایران تهدید: محاصره خلیج + دریای عمان + دریای سرخ اگر محاصره ادامه یابد. محاصره روز ۳: ۱۰+ کشتی برگشته، بدون رویارویی.
نفت: برنت $۹۴.۸۹ (↓)، WTI $۹۰.۷۲ (↓). ترامپ: 'کاملاً شکست دادیم.' Fox Business. کاهش از D47 $۹۵.۷۲. اینترنت کسب‌وکارها روز ۳. صفر حمله D40-D48 (۱۰ روز متوالی). آتش‌بس روز ۱۰ — ۵ روز.
همگرایی ۵.۷ — چهارمین روز متوالی بهبود. فروپاشی ۳۱٪ = توافق ۳۱٪ — مساوی. D45: ۴.۲ → D46: ۴.۶ → D47: ۵.۰ → D48: ۵.۷. بزرگ‌ترین جهش روزانه. توافق ۳۱٪ = بالاترین از آتش‌بس.
ریسک‌ها: شکاف هسته‌ای ۵ vs ۲۰ سال. تهدید ضدمحاصره. ۵ روز. شکاف ساختاری: ایران احتمالاً ۵ سال قبول می‌کند، آمریکا ۲۰ سال می‌خواهد. ۴۴۰ کیلوگرم HEU حل‌نشده. ۵ روز تا ۲۱ آوریل.

theoryEvaluation.title: MUNIR IN TEHRAN = HIGHEST-LEVEL MEDIATION SINCE WAR BEGAN
theoryEvaluation.body: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir arriving in Tehran (not Islamabad) is qualitatively different from any previous diplomatic move. This is the head of Pakistan's military — who also controls Pakistan's ISI and has direct channel to Iranian IRGC leadership — physically in Tehran. This is a back-channel that bypasses civilian diplomatic constraints. Pakistani mediators are 'optimistic about a major breakthrough on nuclear front' (Al Jazeera). The nuclear programme is the core sticking point — if Pakistan's military chief is hand-delivering a US proposal on nuclear terms, this is as serious as it gets before a deal announcement.

theoryEvaluation.title: 'IN PRINCIPLE' EXTENSION + TRUMP 'AMAZING TWO DAYS' = DEAL WITHIN 48 HOURS OR EXTENSION
theoryEvaluation.body: The two signals are complementary not contradictory: AP's 'in principle' extension means both sides have agreed not to let the clock run out; Trump saying 'not thinking about extending' means the US goal is a deal announcement, not a bare extension. These are consistent: Trump wants to announce a deal in the next two days, and the 'in principle' extension ensures he has the space to do so without the ceasefire formally collapsing at midnight Apr 21. The White House saying 'feels good about prospects' is the clearest positive signal since Apr 7. Watch for formal Round 2 announcement in Islamabad today or tomorrow.

theoryEvaluation.title: NUCLEAR GAP NOW DEFINED: 5-YR VS 20-YR — AND 440KG HEU
theoryEvaluation.body: The nuclear sticking point has now been publicly quantified: Iran likely accepting ~5 years of enrichment freeze; US wants ~20 years. The gap between 5 and 20 years is large but not uncrossable — in the 2015 JCPOA, the timeline was 15 years. A 10-year compromise is the obvious bridge. More difficult: what happens to Iran's ~440kg of highly enriched uranium (up to 60% and 20% purity). Options: ship it out (Russia, as in 2015), dilute it in-country (slower, verifiable), or irreversible conversion. This is the operationally hardest part. Watch Munir's proposal on both timelines.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRAN COUNTER-THREAT ON GULF/RED SEA/OMAN = ESCALATION CARD, NOT ACTION
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran threatening to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman AND Red Sea shipping is a public signal that Iran still has escalation tools it hasn't used. Critically: zero action on this threat through blockade Day 3. Iran is using the threat as negotiating leverage — 'give us a deal or we make the blockade mutual and global.' This is actually a deal-oriented behavior: you only threaten escalation if you expect negotiation to prevent it. If Iran intended to escalate, they would act, not announce. The threat itself is evidence of continued diplomatic calculation.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: منیر در تهران = بالاترین سطح میانجیگری از شروع جنگ
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: رئیس ارتش پاکستان در تهران — نه اسلام‌آباد. کانال پشت‌پرده نظامی-نظامی (ISI-IRGC). میانجیان: 'خوشبین به پیشرفت بزرگ هسته‌ای.' هسته‌ای = مرکزی‌ترین نقطه اختلاف. اگر منیر پیشنهاد هسته‌ای آمریکا را مستقیم به تهران می‌آورد = جدی‌ترین تلاش دیپلماتیک.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: تهدید ضدمحاصره = اهرم مذاکره، نه اقدام

warOutcome.prediction_fa: روز ۴۸ (۱۶ آوریل): منیر تهران + توافق اصولی + پیشرفت هسته‌ای. همگرایی ۵.۷ (بالاترین). توافق ۳۱٪ = فروپاشی ۳۱٪ — اولین بار مساوی. بن‌بست ۲۲٪. پیروزی ۱۰٪. مداخله ۵٪. شکاف ۱٪.
warOutcome.derivation: Military exhaustion 6.5 (unchanged — 10 straight days zero attacks, ceasefire political pause, stockpiles intact; Iran counter-threat on Gulf/Red Sea unacted). Economic pain 7.7 (Brent $94.89, WTI $90.72 — fourth day of decline; Iran petrochemicals suspended $54M/day; blockade $435M/day; but market pricing deal = oil falling). Diplomatic momentum 6.5 (UP from 5.0 — Munir in Tehran with nuclear proposal; 'in principle' extension AP; Trump 'amazing two days'; White House 'feels good'; 5-yr vs 20-yr gap defined; 440kg HEU; all channels simultaneously active = best constellation since ceasefire). US political sustainability 3.5 (stable — 'beaten them militarily' framing; oil $90.72; deal announcement preparation). Escalation ceiling distance 3.5 (UP from 2.5 — 3rd blockade day no confrontation; 'in principle' extension = both sides choosing not to escalate; Iran counter-threat rhetoric only; Munir visit = de-escalation signal).
warOutcome.derivation_fa: Military(6.5 ثابت). Economic(7.7 ↓ — برنت $۹۴.۸۹). Diplomatic(6.5 ↑↑ — منیر تهران؛ توافق اصولی؛ 'دو روز شگفت‌انگیز'؛ کاخ سفید خوشبین). Political(3.5 ثابت). Escalation(3.5 ↑ — روز ۳ بدون رویارویی؛ توافق اصولی).
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation: Convergence 5.7/10 — UP from 5.0 D47, 4.6 D46, 4.2 D45. Fourth consecutive day of improvement. Biggest single-day jump. Weighted: Military(6.5×0.25=1.625) + Economic(7.7×0.20=1.54) + Diplomatic(6.5×0.20=1.30) + Political(3.5×0.20=0.70) + Escalation(3.5×0.15=0.525) = 5.69 → 5.7. Key driver: diplomatic momentum jump from 5.0 to 6.5 on Munir in Tehran + 'in principle' extension. Deal 31% = Collapse 31% for first time. Next 48 hours: if Trump announces deal (his 'amazing two days'), convergence would jump to 8+. If collapse, drops to 3.0. Risks: nuclear gap (5-yr vs 20-yr) not bridged; Iran counter-threat on Gulf shipping; 5 days to Apr 21.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation_fa: همگرایی ۵.۷ از ۱۰ — چهارمین روز متوالی. بزرگ‌ترین جهش روزانه. محاسبه: Military(1.625) + Economic(1.54) + Diplomatic(1.30) + Political(0.70) + Escalation(0.525) = 5.69. محرک اصلی: دیپلماسی ۵.۰→۶.۵ (منیر تهران + توافق اصولی). توافق ۳۱٪ = فروپاشی ۳۱٪ — اولین بار. اگر توافق: ۸+. اگر فروپاشی: ۳.۰.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.

سانسور: ارشاد احتمالاً فعال اما ظرفیت نامشخص. مجوز کتاب ممکن تعلیق.
بقای ناشران: ناشران کوچک/متوسط بحران وجودی. انتشارات دانشگاهی بهتر. انتظار ادغام/تعطیلی پس از جنگ.

dealAvailability.reasoning: TRUMP + IRAN ACCEPTED 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE (Apr 7 ~7PM ET, Pakistan-brokered). Trump calls Iran 10-pt 'workable basis.' outcomeProbabilities.derivation_protracted: DOWN from 0.38. Blockade accelerates timeline — less likely to remain protracted, more likely collapse or confrontation.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_intervention: UP from 0.10. Allies refusing blockade. China condemning. If maritime confrontation: international pressure surges.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_other: Regime fracture, coup, rogue IRGC action, Houthi Bab al-Mandab closure.

calibration.polymarketSource: Polymarket: ceasefire-holds ~18% (crashing). Deal by Apr 30 ~15-18%. Conflict-ends-Dec31 ~97%. $280M+ traded. Blockade active = bearish signal but Trump 'deal' talk providing floor.

historicalBaseRate.methodology: Of ~40 post-WWII asymmetric Middle East conflicts, ~35% resolved within 45 days (current D37). Base rate prior.

oilFuturesSignal.interpretation: Spot > futures = market expects crisis is TEMPORARY. Consistent with resolution within months, not years.

calibration.modelVsMarket: Model: ~28% negotiated resolution. Market near-term: ~18% ceasefire holds. Model more optimistic than market because of Pakistan 2nd round + Rubio Lebanon track. But blockade enforcement + 7-day countdown = strong bear case.

confidence.methodology: Ensemble: model-derived (15%) + market signal (~20% Polymarket, crashing) + historical base rate (35%) -> weighted 18%. DOWN from 22%. Naval blockade destroyed remaining diplomatic pathway. Allies refusing. No talks scheduled.

deadlineHistory.threat: April 7 Tue 8PM ET power grid strikes — EXPLICITLY REFUSES to extend
deadlineHistory.outcome: BLINKED 4th time. 90 min before 8PM ET Trump announced 2-week ceasefire on conversation with PM Sharif/FM Munir, contingent on Iran reopening Hormuz. Iran SNSC accepted. Peace talks Islamabad Fri (Vance lead).

trumpPattern.methodology: Bayesian: prior P(follow-through) = 0.70. 3 observed blinks → posterior ~0.16. ADJUSTED UP to 0.22 for: (1) Trump explicitly refuses to extend (different signal from 'good chance'), (2) South Pars energy war precedent already set, (3) Iran 10-pt maximalist = no off-ramp, (4) credibility pressure = 4th blink would be devastating, (5) Iran military defiance = no compliance signal.

sensitivity.input: If a credible deal proposal emerges
sensitivity.interpretation: A credible counter-proposal from Iran would have the largest single impact on resolution probability.

sensitivity.input: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate
sensitivity.interpretation: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate (e.g., Hormuz opening offer), probability triples. This is the binding constraint.
US already wants out. More pressure doesn't help much because the bottleneck is deal + Iran acceptance, not US willingness.
Escalation doesn't increase resolution — it changes the TYPE of resolution (forced vs negotiated). Impact on probability is indirect.

sensitivity.input: If Trump follows through on threat
sensitivity.interpretation: Whether Trump strikes power grid doesn't affect negotiated resolution — it affects escalation vs continuation. Different outcome, same low deal probability.

leadingIndicators.signal: Steady at ~41/day. Rationing model holds. Coordinated barrage + IRGC defiance = institutional continuity proven.
$109.53 settled. Wall Street surged on hope. Markets vs reality mismatch. Binary: $85 or $130+ in <20 hrs.
10/day. Iran 10-pt demands Hormuz toll recognition = permanent change. Won't reopen for temp ceasefire.
Iran 10-pt = most detailed response ever. Islamabad Accord + 10-pt counteroffer = highest specificity. But MAXIMALIST gap.
Declining further. Trump 'I don't know' = allies questioning strategy. Mirror: 'TACO Trump.' IAEA 'deeply concerned.'

ceasefireCalibration.source: Polymarket ceasefire-holds ~18% (down from 20%). Active blockade = maritime war. Trump 'deal' talk partially offsetting. Historical base rate ~50%. 7 days to expiry.

incidents.description: Israel struck 100+ sites in Lebanon. Iran accused US of ceasefire violation via proxy.
incidents.description_fa: اسرائیل بیش از ۱۰۰ هدف در لبنان را بمباران کرد. ایران آمریکا را به نقض آتش‌بس از طریق نماینده متهم کرد.

incidents.description: Lebanon strikes continued. Iran demands Lebanon inclusion in ceasefire.
incidents.description_fa: حملات لبنان ادامه. ایران خواستار شمول لبنان.

incidents.description: US warships attempted Hormuz transit. IRGC issued 'last warning.' Israel rejected Hezbollah ceasefire.
incidents.description_fa: ناوهای آمریکا تلاش عبور هرمز. سپاه 'آخرین هشدار.' اسرائیل رد آتش‌بس حزب‌الله.

incidents.description: 21-hour talks collapsed. Iran refused nuclear commitment. Vance walked out. No new talks scheduled.
incidents.description_fa: مذاکرات ۲۱ ساعته شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس خارج شد. مذاکرات جدید برنامه‌ریزی نشده.

incidents.description: Trump declared naval blockade of all Iranian ports starting Monday 10AM ET. CENTCOM confirmed. Iran calls it 'piracy' and 'act of war during ceasefire.'
incidents.description_fa: ترامپ محاصره دریایی تمام بنادر ایران از دوشنبه ۱۰ صبح اعلام کرد. سنتکام تأیید. ایران: 'دزدی دریایی' و 'اقدام جنگی حین آتش‌بس.'

incidents.description: Israel-Hezbollah exchanges continue. 2,055+ killed in Lebanon. Ceasefire does not cover Lebanon.
incidents.description_fa: تبادل آتش اسرائیل-حزب‌الله ادامه. ۲٬۰۵۵+ کشته لبنان.

incidents.description: US Navy blockade went into effect 10AM ET. All maritime traffic to/from Iranian ports blocked. Ships between non-Iranian ports allowed. China-linked sanctioned tanker tested blockade.
incidents.description_fa: محاصره دریایی نیروی دریایی آمریکا ساعت ۱۰ صبح فعال شد. تمام ترافیک دریایی بنادر ایران مسدود. نفتکش تحریمی چینی محاصره را آزمایش کرد.

incidents.description: Thousands rally in Tehran against blockade. Iran FM: 'piracy.' IRGC: 'ports for everyone or no one.'
incidents.description_fa: هزاران نفر در تهران علیه محاصره تظاهرات. وزیر خارجه: 'دزدی دریایی.' سپاه: 'بنادر برای همه یا هیچ‌کس.'

incidents.description: Israel-Hezbollah exchanges continue. Lebanon 2,055+ killed. UK urged Lebanon inclusion in ceasefire. Rubio talks Tuesday.
incidents.description_fa: تبادل آتش اسرائیل-حزب‌الله ادامه. لبنان ۲٬۰۵۵+ کشته. روبیو مذاکرات سه‌شنبه.

incidents.description: Blockade Day 2 fully implemented (CENTCOM). 13 ships turned away cumulative. No boardings. Iran FM: 'piracy.' Trump Fox Business: 'close to over, very close to over.'
incidents.description_fa: محاصره روز دوم به طور کامل اجرا شد (سنتکام). ۱۳ کشتی بازگردانده شد. ترامپ: «بسیار نزدیک به پایان است.»

incidents.description: Iran spokeswoman Mohajerani: $270B war compensation demand. 5-pt counter: end attacks + security guarantees + $270B reparations + Hormuz sovereignty + intl recognition.
incidents.description_fa: سخنگوی ایران مهاجرانی: مطالبه ۲۷۰ میلیارد دلار غرامت جنگ. شرایط ۵ ماده‌ای ایران.

incidents.description: Israel-Hezbollah strikes continue. Lebanon dead 2,100+. UN experts condemn 'unprecedented' Israeli bombing.
incidents.description_fa: حملات اسرائیل-حزب‌الله ادامه دارد. لبنان بیش از ۲۱۰۰ کشته. کارشناسان سازمان ملل بمباران را «بی‌سابقه» محکوم کردند.

incidents.description: Gen. Caine WIDENED blockade scope WORLDWIDE — US forces will stop any vessel 'tied to Tehran or carrying supplies' (weapons, oil, metals, electronics) anywhere globally, including Pacific. 14 ships turned away cumulative. Hegseth: 'ready to restart combat' if no deal.
incidents.description_fa: ژنرال کین دامنه محاصره را در سراسر جهان گسترش داد — هر کشتی متصل به تهران در هر نقطه از جهان متوقف می‌شود. هگست: آماده از سرگیری جنگ.

incidents.target: Persian Gulf + Sea of Oman + Red Sea
incidents.description: Iran armed forces threatened to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, AND Red Sea shipping in retaliation for worldwide blockade. Rhetorical — 10-day zero-attack streak intact.
incidents.description_fa: نیروهای مسلح ایران تهدید به مسدود کردن خلیج فارس، دریای عمان و دریای سرخ کردند. ۱۰ روز بدون حمله.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump announces 2-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir. Iran SNSC accepts via Araghchi.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ آتش‌بس دو هفته‌ای را اعلام کرد. شورای عالی امنیت ملی ایران از طریق عراقچی پذیرفت.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad peace talks announced for Friday Apr 11. VP Vance to lead US delegation.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات صلح اسلام‌آباد برای جمعه ۱۱ آوریل اعلام شد. وایس پنس وانس هیئت آمریکا را رهبری خواهد کرد.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks reportedly delayed to Saturday Apr 12. Iran delegation composition unclear.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات ظاهراً به شنبه ۱۲ آوریل موکول شد. ترکیب هیئت ایران نامشخص است.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks delayed from Friday to Saturday. Lebanon strikes escalated. Iran re-halted Hormuz opening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات از جمعه به شنبه موکول شد. حملات لبنان تشدید. ایران بازگشایی هرمز متوقف.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad talks began — 21-hour marathon. US delegation ~300 (Vance, Witkoff, Kushner) vs Iran ~70 (Ghalibaf, Araghchi). Largest diplomatic meeting of the war.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات اسلام‌آباد شروع — ماراتن ۲۱ ساعته. هیئت آمریکا ~۳۰۰ (ونس، ویتکاف، کوشنر) مقابل ایران ~۷۰ (قالیباف، عراقچی).

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left saying 'not enough.' Ghalibaf blamed US 'maximalism.' No new talks scheduled. Ceasefire expires Apr 21.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس: 'کافی نیست.' قالیباف: 'ماکسیمالیسم آمریکا.' مذاکرات جدید نیست. آتش‌بس ۲۱ آوریل.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TRUMP DECLARES NAVAL BLOCKADE. CENTCOM: all Iranian port traffic blocked starting Monday 10AM ET. No new peace talks scheduled. UK, France, Spain, Turkey refuse to join. China condemns. Diplomatic isolation deepening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ محاصره دریایی اعلام کرد. سنتکام: بنادر ایران از دوشنبه. مذاکرات جدید نیست. بریتانیا، فرانسه، اسپانیا، ترکیه رد. چین محکوم.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Pakistan offers 2nd Islamabad round; Rubio hosts Israel-Lebanon ambassadors Tue
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: پاکستان دور دوم اسلام‌آباد پیشنهاد؛ روبیو میزبان سفرای اسرائیل-لبنان سه‌شنبه
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: First potential Lebanon ceasefire track. Pakistan keeping channel open despite Islamabad collapse.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump 'close to over' (Fox Business) + Iran $270B reparations counter + business internet partial
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ «بسیار نزدیک به پایان» + ضدپیشنهاد ۲۷۰ میلیارد دلار ایران + اینترنت تجاری جزئی
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: $270B reparations + Hormuz sovereignty are biggest gaps; nuclear 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze still unresolved.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Munir (Pakistan army chief) in Tehran with US proposal; Trump announces 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire 5PM ET; AP: 'in principle' agreement to extend Iran ceasefire beyond Apr 21
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: منیر (رئیس ارتش پاکستان) در تهران با پیشنهاد آمریکا؛ ترامپ آتش‌بس ۱۰ روزه اسرائیل-لبنان از ۵ بعدازظهر؛ توافق «در اصول» برای تمدید آتش‌بس ایران
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: 'In principle' extension not formally agreed (US official to CNBC). Nuclear gap: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze, ~440kg HEU stockpile. Hegseth 'restart combat' threat is paired stick. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry.

ceasefireEconomicRecovery.note: Blockade WIDENED worldwide D48 (Gen. Caine — any Iran-linked vessel anywhere). Hormuz still ~6 vessels (90% below pre-war 135). Brent fell to $94.89 on Lebanon ceasefire + Munir Tehran + 'in principle' extension hopes, offsetting blockade escalation. Israel-Lebanon 10-day truce 5PM ET D48 = removes proxy-front pressure. Polymarket ceasefire-extension odds 78% (from 18%) = markets pricing in deal.

branchExtend.detail: Most likely if framework but no final agreement. Pakistan mediates.

branchDeal.detail: Mine clearance, insurance normalization, escorts resume.

branchCollapse.detail: Immediate return to pre-ceasefire dynamics. Worse — broken trust amplifies.
Worse than before — broken ceasefire = higher risk premium.

branchStalled.detail: Talks stall, Hormuz slow, both sides posturing.
Tension builds. Markets re-price war risk.
